headline: Duke Energy Grants Tie Florida Storm Readiness To Long Term Grid Risks
summary: Duke Energy Foundation, linked to NYSE:DUK, has awarded new grants in Florida to support community storm preparedness as hurricane season begins. The grants focus on strengthening grid resilience and local emergency readiness in areas served by Duke Energy. Funds are directed toward projects that support critical infrastructure, public safety programs, and community response capabilities. Duke Energy, through NYSE:DUK, supplies regulated electric power to customers in several US regions,...

headline: Why Investors Should Add Atmos Energy to Their Portfolio Right Now?
summary: ATO's customer growth, new rate approvals and $4.2B FY26 capex plan support earnings and dividend hikes despite the recent share dip.

headline: New Duke Energy program helps South Carolina nonresidential customers lower costs while supporting a growing grid
summary: The Public Service Commission of South Carolina has approved the launch of a new nonresidential demand response program that leverages customer storage assets as flexible grid resources while delivering direct value to participating customers. By enrolling a qualifying energy storage system, customers can earn bill credits while helping support a more reliable grid during periods of high demand as the Carolinas continue to grow.
